overview: National Institute of Technology Srinagar (NIT Srinagar), established in 1960 as Regional Engineering College Srinagar, is a premier autonomous public technical university located in Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir. Declared an Institute of National Importance by the Ministry of Education, Government of India, the institution is uniquely situated on the banks of the world-famous Dal Lake next to the Hazratbal Shrine, offering advanced undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degrees in engineering, sciences, and management.
accreditation: An Institution of National Importance approved by the AICTE and Ministry of Education, Government of India.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: General/EWS/OBC (Family Income > ₹5 Lakhs): ₹62,500 per semester (Total tuition fee around ₹5.00 Lakhs for 4 years). 100% tuition exemption is provided for SC/ST/PH students and those with an annual family income under ₹1 Lakh.
General/OBC/EWS: ₹35,000 tuition fee per semester (Total institutional fee ranges between ₹1.48 Lakhs to ₹2.56 Lakhs for 2 years). Category-wise exemptions follow standard CCMT allocation guidelines.
General/OBC/EWS: ₹14,500 tuition fee per semester (Total institutional fees reflect ₹47,080 to ₹1.74 Lakhs depending on the chosen discipline).
₹1,00,000 tuition fee per semester (Total tuition fee around ₹4.00 Lakhs for the 2-year program duration).

placements.avgSalary: ₹8.90 LPA (Overall Average Package), ₹13.80 LPA (B.Tech CSE Average Package)
placements.placementRate: Approximately 76.94% overall placement rate for registered engineering students
placements.totalOffers: 724 recruitment offers generated through campus placement cycles
placements.companiesVisited: 80 companies actively participated in the formal placement drives
placements.internationalOffers: Limited / Kept under standard institutional non-disclosure guidelines

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech allocations are executed via JoSAA/CSAB centralized counseling frameworks using JEE Main ranks. M.Tech tracks necessitate a valid GATE score processed through CCMT. M.Sc programs use IIT JAM scores via CCMN, while MBA admissions rely on CAT scores followed by gd/pi procedures.
admissions.importantDates: Strictly aligned with notifications from the National Testing Agency (NTA), JoSAA/CSAB, and central allocation networks.

campus.area: Residential lakefront campus located at Hazratbal, Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir, India - 190006
campus.specialNote: Total estimated hostel fees including meal plans run around ₹2.27 Lakhs for the 4-year B.Tech path. Candidates must verify regional internet parameters and calendar details via official portals during peak snow seasons.

availableScholarships: Income-Linked Central Tuition Fee Remission Matrix
Central Sector Scholarship Scheme for SC/ST students
scholarshipsAndAid.details: General, OBC-NCL, and EWS candidates receive a 100% tuition waiver if certified annual family income is under ₹1 Lakh. A 2/3rd waiver on the base tuition fee applies if family income falls between ₹1 Lakh and ₹5 Lakhs per year.

rankings.nirf: Ranked #73 in India under the Engineering Category in NIRF 2025
rankings.naac: Not applicable (An autonomous Institute of National Importance governed by the centralized National Institutes of Technology Act)

contact.address: National Institute of Technology Srinagar, Hazratbal, Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir, India 190006
